name: Eldrador® Creatures
short_description: Go into combat together with your favourite Eldrador® Creatures in the Battle of the 4 Worlds and defeat the other factions so that you can call the powerful Superweapon your own and rule over Eldrador!
detailed_description:
Plunge into the world of Eldrador® Creatures in this turn-based strategy game.

Go into combat together with your favourite Eldrador® Creatures in the Battle
of the 4 Worlds and defeat the other factions so that you can call the powerful
Superweapon your own and rule over Eldrador!

• 20 playable original Eldrador® Creatures, including new creatures like the Rock
Beast and the Shadow Panther, as well as the exclusive Eldrador® Mini Creatures

• Use the special abilities of your chosen creatures to defeat your opponents in
tactical combat

• Battle in all 4 gameworld settings: Lava, Ice, Stone and Jungle !

• Dynamic worlds due to toppling elements like walls and bridges

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German*, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
